description: The Commonwealth Scholarship Commission in the UK (CSC) provides the main UK government scholarship scheme led by international development objectives. CSC is an executive non-departmental public body, sponsored by the Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office .

details.body:
The Commonwealth Scholarship Commission in the UK (CSC) provides the main UK government scholarship scheme led by international development objectives.

CSC is an executive non-departmental public body, sponsored by the Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office.

logo.formatted_title: Commonwealth Scholarship Commission in the UK

ordered_featured_links.title: Apply for a Commonwealth Scholarship or Fellowship

details.secondary_corporate_information_pages: Read about the types of information we routinely publish in our Publication scheme.

social_media_links.title: Commonwealth Scholarships group (current and former Commonwealth Scholars and Fellows only)

available_translations.title: Commonwealth Scholarship Commission in the UK

details.body:
The Chair, Commonwealth Scholarship Commission in the UK is responsible for:

  • formulating the CSC’s strategy
  • ensuring that the CSC, in reaching decisions, takes proper account of guidance provided by the Foreign Secretary or FCDO
  • promoting the efficient and effective use of staff, commissioner expertise and other resources
  • encouraging high standards of propriety
  • representing the views of the CSC to the general public

role.title: Chair, Commonwealth Scholarship Commission in the UK

role_appointments.title: Professor Robin Mason - Chair, Commonwealth Scholarship Commission in the UK

details.body:
Commonwealth Scholarship Commissioners are responsible for:

  • ensuring that the CSC fulfils the aims and objectives set by FCDO
  • promoting the efficient and effective use of staff and other resources by the CSC
  • ensuring that individuals are selected for Commonwealth Scholarships and Fellowships on merit and on the basis of clear criteria which reflect the objectives of FCDO and, where appropriate, other sponsoring departments

role.title: Deputy Chair, Commonwealth Scholarship Commission in the UK
